results.name: Zyfai
results.bio:
Grow your capital with rule-based agents.

https://t.co/V8aQsiJXDn
results.text:
Wallets, fintechs, and neobanks all face the same problem: how do you offer onchain yield to your users?

Today that usually means:
→ Hiring a wealth management team
→ Building infrastructure to monitor markets 24/7
→ Running daily settlement and operations

Or you skip "Earn" entirely because it's too expensive to run.

Agent Vaults offer a third path: verifiable, rule-based Agents that manage capital autonomously.

results.name: Taieb Chaouch
results.bio: Building the Trust Layer for a Post-AI World. | @Vettedprotocol
results.text:
I went from occupational therapy to web3 recruiting. No career path connects those two. No recruiter would have surfaced my profile for the role I ended up building a career in.

If I wasn't somehow lucky, I'd have been filtered out before anyone qualified ever looked. And that doesn't happen to everyone.

I've watched it happen constantly as a recruiter. Capable people filtered because their career doesn't follow a recognizable pattern. Degrees, employer names, linear progressions. Anything out
results.job_title: I Went From Occupational Therapy Recruiting
